name: Consent App
tagline: Encrypted consent management — Face ID/fingerprint auth, 8 legal templates, PDF export with SHA-256 tamper detection, RevenueCat billing
description: React Native Expo app for creating, signing, and managing legal consent records. AES encryption vault with SHA-256 key derivation. Face ID and fingerprint auth with PIN fallback. 8 pre-built templates: medical, NDA, GDPR, photo release, research, property entry, liability waiver, mutual release. PDF export with SHA-256 tamper detection hash. Audio recording with waveform visualization. RevenueCat: Free (5 records) / Pro $4.99/mo (unlimited).
content_angles: Mobile app for managing consent and permissions
Built with React Native + Expo for cross-platform deployment
